style_guide_prompt: Create one isolated accessory sprite for a children's animal learning app. Use a soft rounded 2D cartoon style, clean outlines, gentle shading, centered composition, and transparent background. Show only the accessory with no animal, no face, no text, no symbols, and no extra props. Design the accessory as if it will be overlaid onto a front-facing animal portrait, so the geometry must read clearly from the front. Any left/right details should be mirrored correctly for a centered front view rather than both pointing the same direction.

assets.subject_prompt: A playful black top hat with a satin ribbon, front-facing and slightly tilted.
A striped party hat with a fluffy pom-pom and tiny confetti dots.
A soft wizard hat with gold stars and a slightly floppy tip.
A colorful baseball cap with a curved brim, front-facing.
A cheerful rain hat with a rounded brim and tiny raindrop pattern.
A friendly gold crown with rounded jewel shapes and no sharp points.
A small flower crown with pastel blossoms and leafy accents.
A neat bow tie with rounded loops and a bright center knot.
A playful oversized bow with butterfly-like loops and soft pastel colors.

A pair of small round glasses with thin frames and clear lenses, front-facing and horizontally centered. The left and right temples should mirror each other correctly, with one extending left and one extending right.

A pair of heart-shaped glasses with candy colors and clear centers, front-facing and horizontally centered. The left and right temples should mirror each other correctly, with one extending left and one extending right.

A pair of star-shaped glasses with playful sparkly edges, front-facing and horizontally centered. The left and right temples should mirror each other correctly, with one extending left and one extending right.

A pair of child-friendly aviator sunglasses with rounded corners, front-facing and horizontally centered. The left and right arms should mirror each other correctly, with one extending left and one extending right.
A shiny monocle with a tiny chain curl and clear glass.
A soft sleep mask with tiny stars and rounded edges.
A bright necktie with a rounded knot and one simple stripe.
A cozy scarf wrapped once with friendly knitted texture.
A shiny ribbon medal with a star medallion, front-facing.
A cluster of soft magical sparkles and twinkles floating around an empty center.
A pair of chunky friendly headphones with padded ear cups and bright colors, drawn for a front-facing portrait with mirrored left and right sides.
